Hardware Component File

CDM_Sweet400_V2.0

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference CDM_Sweet400_V2.0_20220420T163850.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 2000000
Send ID 70C
Receive ID 700
Functional Addr 25
Functional Name IDM-CDM
